option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value: FROM node:18 WORKDIR /usr/src/app COPY package.json . RUN npm install COPY . . EXPOSE 3000 CMD ["npm", "start"]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
version: '3.8' services: db: image: mysql:8.0 environment: MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: example MYSQL_DATABASE: tmanager ports: - "3306:3306" volumes: - db_data:/var/lib/mysql
api: build: . environment: DB_HOST: db DB_USER: root DB_PASS: example DB_NAME: tmanager ports: - "3000:3000" depends_on: - db
volumes: db_data:

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
